An ordinance approving and confirm


ing the assessments and assessment


roll for the Improvement Of Knox


avenue. from the center line of


Monroe street to the center line Of


Jefferson street, by grading. curb


ing and parking the same. and


to provide for the collection of


assessments and the payment of


the bonds issued therefor.


Whereas. the assessment roll for
the assessment district established
for the payment of Improving Knox
avenue. I'm the city of Spokane, from
the center line OF Monroe street to
the center line of Jefferson street, by
grading, curbing and parking the
same. came duly and regularly before
the city council on the LIST day of
July. 1902, for approval and confirm
alton. and no objection heing made
thereto. the same was duly confirmed
and approved: therefore:


The city of Spokane does ordain
az follows:


Section /. That the lots and par
cels of land described In the ASSESS
ment district and on said assessment
roll for the said Improvement. to the
extent OF the assessments levied
against them, and each of them, be
and they and each of them are hereby
assessed therefor. as in said assess
ment roll stated.


cd In Ordinance No. A121g. passed
September 10. 1902 shall be issued to
the contractor making said improve
ment In the sum OF the contract price
therefor. or such sum AZ he may be
entitled to under his contract AZ certi-
fled by the board of public works
provided. however that no bonds
shall be issued as herein provided be-
fore the expiration of 80 DAYS after
the date of delinquency of the first
installment of the first assessment
as hereinafter provided.


Section 3. The said assessments
shall bear interest from the date of
